name: ozi-build

metadata.name: OZI.build
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Create pep517 compliant packages from the meson build system, OZI-maintained fork.

documentation:
# OZI.build

This is the [OZI-Project](https://github.com/OZI-Project) maintained fork of the mesonpep517 0.2 tag.

This is a simple module that implements pep517 for the meson build system.

This means that you only need to provide a `pyproject.toml` in your project
source root to be able to publish your project built with meson on PyPI
and to create a wheel for the project.

For more information have a look at [the documentation](https://docs.oziproject.dev/en/stable/ozi_build.html)

OZI.build is licensed under Apache-2.0 and includes `pyc_wheel` and
portions of `wheel` whose copyright information is reproduced here.

modules.name: ozi_build.pep425tags
documentation: Generate PEP 425 compatibility tags.
The pep425tag modules includes (slightly altered) code from the
'wheel.pep452tags' module of the 'wheel' project
<https://pypi.org/project/wheel>, released under the MIT license.

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_abbr_impl
documentation: Return abbreviated implementation name.

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_abi_tag
documentation:
Return the ABI tag based on SOABI (if available) or emulate SOABI
(CPython 2, PyPy).

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_config_var
documentation:
Return value of given sysconfig variable or given default value, if it
is not set.

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_flag
documentation:
Use a fallback method for determining SOABI flags if the needed config
var is unset or unavailable.

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_impl_ver
documentation: Return implementation version.

functions.name: ozi_build.pep425tags.get_platform_tag
documentation: Return the PEP-425 compatible platform tag.

modules.name: ozi_build._pyc_wheel
documentation: Compile all py files in a wheel to pyc files.

Licensed under the MIT License
https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT

functions.name: ozi_build._pyc_wheel.convert_wheel
documentation: Generate a new whl with only pyc files.

functions.name: ozi_build._pyc_wheel.rewrite_dist_info
documentation: Rewrite the record file with pyc files instead of py files.

functions.name: ozi_build._pyc_wheel._get_platform
documentation: Return our platform name 'win32', 'linux_x86_64'

functions.name: ozi_build._pyc_wheel._b64encode
documentation: urlsafe_b64encode without padding

modules.name: ozi_build.buildapi
documentation: PEP-517 compliant buildsystem API

functions.name: ozi_build.buildapi.get_requires_for_build_wheel
documentation: Returns a list of requirements for building, as strings

functions.name: ozi_build.buildapi.prepare_metadata_for_build_wheel
documentation: Creates {metadata_directory}/foo-1.2.dist-info

functions.name: ozi_build.buildapi.build_wheel
documentation: Builds a wheel, places it in wheel_directory

functions.name: ozi_build.buildapi.build_sdist
documentation: Builds an sdist, places it in sdist_directory
